title: Global rebaseline at quiescence — correct CP=19.05 and Curtains=21.29 stale phantoms
goal: ORCHESTRATOR-ONLY task, run at a FULLY-QUIESCENT moment (0 agents rendering). baseline_engine.json holds STALE phantom values that make push_helper's gate red for every agent, forcing manual pushes: (1) Stylized__Color_Panels=19.05 but honest post-filter-reversal value is ~17.95-18.22 — the 19.05 was re-frozen by 3ba7b5e (T-qca011a65, a timemap-only Earthquake fix that CANNOT affect CP's filter render) on cached pre-reversal frames. (2) Objects__Curtains=21.29 but actual fresh ~23.18. (3) Movements__Smear/Wipes__Mask known stale-store. PROCEDURE: with 0 agents active, fresh full `gen engine --all` (FCT_JOBS default), then `fct baseline` re-freeze, commit 'baseline: global re-freeze — correct CP/Curtains/Smear stale phantoms (Rule 11: correct filter-order reversal T-qb697c0d4 regressed already-imperfect Color_Panels 19.05->~18)'. Record the CP regression in ROADMAP per Rule 11. DoD: fresh gen==baseline for all 65, gate green with 0 phantom flags.
notes: Must run at quiescence. Unblocks clean gate for every future task.
